nasb.text: What He has seen and heard, of that He testifies; and no one receives His testimony.

esv.text: He bears witness to what he has seen and heard, yet no one receives his testimony.

cnv.text: 他把所見所聞的見證出來，可是沒有人接受他的見證。

ccb.text: 要把所见所闻讲给人听，只是没有人接受祂的见证。

csbs.text: 他见证他所看到的、他所听到的，可是没有人接受他的见证。
